body.title: Codebase tree annotator: palace.codebase.* nodes with problem signatures
body.result: annotator.py created; 474 palace.codebase.* nodes in clan.memories; Nanny nightly 04:30 entry added; 12 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that palace.codebase.unseen_university.* nodes exist with problem_signature fields so classify() can query them for builder reports.
body.description:
Annotation pipeline that builds palace.codebase.unseen_university.* nodes. Uses clan.code_index (T-code-index-schema, already closed) as scaffold — symbol index provides file/class/function structure; LLM annotation pass adds problem_signature per module (e.g. 'handles: multi-turn agent loops, cost caps, tier escalation'). Initial full build runs once; nightly Nanny sweep re-annotates files changed in last 24h. Delta-on-ticket-close descoped to T-annotator-delta-update.

Nodes land in clan.memories as rows with path = 'palace.codebase.unseen_university.<module>' and metadata->>'problem_signature' set.

**Affected files:** new devices/classifier/annotator.py; Nanny schedule (devices/nanny/ schedule config — add annotator step alongside existing code_sweep entry)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing; Postgres for state
**Scope boundary:** In scope: annotator + Nanny nightly sweep + initial full build script. Out of scope: delta-on-ticket-close (T-annotator-delta-update), multi-project (UU codebase only first), domain trees (separate).
**Completion criteria:** T-codebase-tree-annotator is CLOSED; `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clan.memories WHERE path LIKE 'palace.codebase.unseen_university.%' AND metadata->>''problem_signature'' IS NOT NULL` returns > 0 after annotator runs; Nanny nightly log shows annotator step.
